backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Aventra Estates ICP backend, defining data types (Property, User, Enquiry, Testimonial) and exposing query/update methods for user management, property CRUD, enquiries, wishlists, testimonials, and admin analytics with role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state to the new schema, primarily adding the `#rent` variant to `ListingStatus` while preserving all other property, user, enquiry, and testimonial data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: adding a dedicated 'Rent' property category throughout the app, and updating all site-wide contact information to official Aventra Estates details, with associated file paths and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing each component or page's purpose, serving as a quick reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Aventra Estates React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, property listing/detail, login, dashboard, post/edit property, wishlist, and admin pages) wrapped in a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Reusable UI component that displays an access-denied message with a shield icon and a link back to the home page for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/AgentCard.tsx: Displays a property agent's contact card with phone, email, and WhatsApp buttons, falling back to default Aventra Estates contact info if no props are provided. Supports a loading skeleton state.
frontend/src/components/EMICalculator.ts: Interactive EMI calculator component with sliders for loan amount, interest rate, and tenure that computes and displays monthly EMI, total interest, and total payment.
frontend/src/components/EnquiryForm.tsx: A validated enquiry form that collects name, phone, email, and message from users and submits them as a property enquiry via the useCreateEnquiry mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProperti: Fetches and renders up to 6 featured properties in a responsive grid using PropertyCard components, with skeleton loading states and an empty state fallback.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer displaying the Aventra Estates brand, quick navigation links, property type categories, and contact information including phone, email, and address.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a looping background video (falling back to a static image), headline text, CTA buttons, stats, and an embedded SearchBar component.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallerySlid: A responsive image gallery slider component with navigation arrows, thumbnail strip, and a fullscreen lightbox modal for viewing property images.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: A simple layout wrapper that composes the Navigation header, main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/LuxuryCollection: A homepage section that fetches and displays up to 6 luxury-flagged properties in a dark-themed grid with hover effects and price formatting.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: A fixed top navigation bar with transparent-to-solid scroll behavior, Internet Identity auth, admin/dashboard links, and a mobile sheet menu.
frontend/src/components/PropertyCard.tsx: A card component for displaying a single property with image, badges (featured/luxury/rent/construction), price, and a WhatsApp contact button.
frontend/src/components/PropertyListingF: A sidebar/mobile filter panel for property listings supporting listing type, location text search, property type, BHK type, price range slider, and boolean toggles.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A search bar with Buy/Rent tabs and a location input that navigates to the properties listing page with the appropriate query parameters.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsCaro: A carousel component that displays client testimonials with star ratings, author avatars, and prev/next navigation, fetching data via useGetTestimonials and falling back to hardcoded testimonials if none are returned.
frontend/src/components/UnderConstructio: A section component that filters and displays up to 6 under-construction properties in a grid with image, badge, price, and a link to each property detail page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, exposing login/logout functions and identity state with status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the application, covering CRUD operations and queries for user profiles, properties, testimonials, enquiries, analytics, and admin/approval workflows via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, defines a luxury gold/white/black CSS custom property palette for light and dark themes, and provides Tailwind utility classes for gold gradients, shadows, and card hover effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminApprovalsPage.ts: Admin page for reviewing user approval requests, allowing admins to approve or reject users via a table UI with status badges and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard overview page displaying platform analytics stats (properties, users, approvals, enquiries) and quick navigation links to admin sub-pages.
frontend/src/pages/AdminListingsPage.tsx: Admin page for managing property listings with actions to approve, reject, feature/unfeature, and delete properties displayed in a sortable table.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUsersPage.tsx: Admin page for viewing all registered users and toggling their roles between admin and user via a table with role badges and confirmation prompts.
frontend/src/pages/EditPropertyPage.tsx: Form page for editing an existing property listing, pre-populating fields from fetched property data and submitting updates including amenities via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page for Aventra Estates, composing sections like HeroSection, FeaturedProperties, LuxuryCollection, and Testimonials, along with static 'Why Choose Us' and 'Browse by Locality' sections for Pune neighborhoods.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Handles user authentication via Internet Identity and conditionally renders a profile setup form for new users, redirecting authenticated users with existing profiles to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PostPropertyPage.tsx: A multi-step form page (4 steps) for listing a new property, collecting basic info, property details, and features, then submitting via the createProperty mutation.
frontend/src/pages/PropertyDetailPage.ts: Displays full details of a single property including an image carousel, amenities, owner/agent info, and an enquiry submission form, fetching data by propertyId from the URL.
frontend/src/pages/PropertyListingPage.t: A filterable and sortable property listing page that fetches all properties and applies client-side filters for location, type, BHK, price range, listing type, and flags like luxury or featured.
frontend/src/pages/UserDashboard.tsx: User dashboard page showing a logged-in user's property listings with stats (total, active, pending), and options to create, edit, delete, or view each property. Requires authentication via Internet Identity; shows AccessDeniedScreen otherwise.
frontend/src/pages/WishlistPage.tsx: Wishlist page that displays a grid of saved properties for the authenticated user, with the ability to remove items. Shows AccessDeniedScreen if not logged in and an empty-state prompt if the wishlist is empty.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a luxury design system with custom color tokens (gold, obsidian, ivory), serif/sans font families, extended border radii, gold box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot for Aventra Estates describing the overall architecture (React/Next.js, Node.js, MongoDB), luxury UI theme, target Pune localities, and a catalogue of existing implemented features.
